prompt: How do you make an bat file that talks to a server?
evidence: Basically I have employees and I don't want them to know my powershell commands. So I would like to make my .BAT files into EXE files and everytime it is ran it will ask for a user name and password and send to the server a +1 that it was used to that account. I know php, but wasn't sure how to do this a standalone exe file for each of my scripts?
